title: paracroton pendulus subsp. zeylanicus
intro: Paracroton pendulus subsp. zeylanicus, also known as the Ceylonese paracroton, is a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Paracroton pendulus subsp. zeylanicus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are believed to promote overall health and well-being.
